title: WELLXUNK Mermaid Stuffed Doll for Kids, Mermaid Soft Toy, Mer-maid Plush Toys for Boys Girls Kids（Pink ）
features: 【Adorable Design】: Our comfortable Mermaid is a cute plush toy designed to compain young children. This Mermaid plush toys is super soft for babies to cuddle, fall asleep with, and soothe.
【High Quality Material】: Our Mermaid Cute Plushies are manufactured using durable plush material. Also, they are long lasting because of high quality PP cotton material.

【Super Soft Stuffed Unicorn Plush Pillow 】: little kids can snuggle with the stuffed Mermaid pillow while playing and sleeping, and office members also can have comfortable relaxing time with the soft office animal pillow.
【Creative Gift】: The Mermaid plushies are the great gift for kids on birthday. The cute and funny plush toys will surprise your kids anytime and anywhere.

【Mermaid Plush Toys】: The Mermaid plushie toy is suitable for bedroom, living room, office/desk, sofa, its cute look can win kids love. It is not only a plush toy, but also a good choice for daily home decoration.
